headline: How Ford plans to rebuild truck inventory after supplier disruptions
summary: Inventory constraints, partly caused by fires at a key aluminum supplier, led to a 16% decline in F-Series pickup sales in the first quarter of 2026.

headline: Used Tesla For $25,000
summary: A new Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) Model 3 with All-Wheel Drive has a base price of just $50,000. A similarly featured Model Y costs about the same. Each is priced below the industry average for a new EV, which is $60,000. One of the barriers to EV adoption in the US is price. Tesla has begun ... Used Tesla For $25,000

headline: Ford Summer Shutdown Move Aims To Lift F Series Output And Value
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) is canceling its traditional summer shutdowns at four key pickup truck plants. The move is intended to recover F Series production following earlier supply chain disruptions tied to a fire at a major aluminum supplier. Ford targets an additional 50,000 F Series trucks produced in 2026 through this schedule change. For readers watching NYSE:F, this move centers on Ford's core franchise, the F Series pickup line, which is a central part of its truck and commercial vehicle...

headline: Hyundai's Boulder concept previews the automaker's truck future, built in America
summary: Hyundai showed off its Boulder concept, a rugged, body-on-frame SUV with a design language Hyundai calls "Art of Steel" at the New York International Auto Show this week. For a brand long associated with efficient sedans and crossovers, it's a striking statement — and a deliberate one.

headline: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
